title: Industrial HA-Cluster Protocol
requirements: Quorum-based replication: Minimum 3 replicas per critical regional shard.
Leader election: Automatic failover to healthy replicas within <500ms.
State consistency: Enforce 'Strict-Sovereignty' (Egypt-soil nodes are masters).
Compliance: Adherence to Law 151 data residency for cluster metadata.

logic.clustering: Group replicas into 'Sovereignty-Units' via Kubernetes namespaces.
logic.replication: Synchronous state propagation across localized cluster nodes.
logic.healing: Automated provisioning of new replicas on node failure.
